_doc: Single source of truth for feature validation limits. V6 architecture: soil-driven stacked ensemble trained on Crop_recommendation_v2.csv (real per-sample variability). V3 stacked ensemble DEPRECATED (circular crop-averaged features).

acceptance._doc: Hard input limits for Pydantic, Django serializer, and frontend min/max. Derived from V6 training data range + small margin.

v6_soil_model._doc: V6 stacked ensemble — soil-driven, trained on Crop_recommendation_v2.csv (per-sample variability, NOT crop-averaged). Replaces circular V3. Base: BalancedRF + XGBoost + LightGBM, Meta: LogisticRegression (isotonic calibrated).

deprecated_v3._doc: DEPRECATED. V3 stacked ensemble trained on real_world_merged_dataset.csv. CIRCULAR: N/P/K/humidity/moisture are per-crop constants (zero std). Model learns crop-average → crop label. Kept for reference only.
deprecated_v3.reason: Features derived from crop identity during data pipeline (09_real_world_pipeline.py). Per-crop std = 0.0 for N/P/K/humidity/moisture.
